combined_text: CBS, Donny Osmond Re-Name That Tune "Today’s News CBS, Donny Osmond Re-Name That Tune By Matt Mitovich | Oct 10, 2006 2:25 PM EDTVariety reports that CBS is prepping a new version of the classic game show Name That Tune, to be hosted by the white and nerdy Donny Osmond.
